title: Republic TV journalists arrested for filming Iranian warship move Kerala court for bail
description: Two Republic TV journalists, who were arrested for attempting to record visuals of an Iranian naval vessel anchored inside Cochin Port, have approached a Kerala court seeking bail. The Judicial First Class Magistrate-I court in Ernakulam heard their bail application on Monday and reserved verdict in the matter. Reporter Sankar CG and cameraman S Mani along with a boat driver were taken into custody in Kochi on Sunday, March 8. The group was detained for capturing visuals of the IRIS Lavan, which
